creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 176923
boost 1.62 + long double fix + libreoffice4 fix (+ commit message)

- Update to 1.62
- Drop .so.MAJOR compatibility links

Hmm, `long double` fix reminds me of bug 193528 and also checks __FreeBSD_version__ without <sys/param.h> or <osreldate.h>.
